name: Rice & Barley Stuffing for Cornish Hens
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Canned cranberry sauce with gel rinsed off
or half marmalade and half diced orange peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the rice in the butter, then add 1-1/4 to 1-1/2 cups water and chicken broth cubes; cook until soft.
2. Cook barley in 1 cup water and a second chicken broth cube for 45 minutes or until tender.
3. If using fresh cranberries, briefly cook with a little sugar to soften slightly and release some juice.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients with the cooked rice and barley.
5. Stuff Cornish hens and cook according to package instructions. Brush stuffed birds with melted butter and sprinkle with salt, pepper, crushed basil, and tarragon if desired.
6. The stuffing may be frozen for future use.
Variation: Substitute sliced mushrooms for the raisins.
